item.title: Scotty James Is Edged Out by Yuto Totsuka of Japan in the Halfpipe.
item.description: Scotty James of Australia laid down a strong run, but was outdone by Japan’s Yuto Totsuka.

item.title: Live Updates: Rubio Emphasizes Shared History With Europe at Munich Security Conference
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio also echoed the Trump administration’s talking points on the threat of Western decline.

item.title: Rubio Stresses Shared History to Europeans but Also Warns of ‘Civilizational Erasure’
item.description: In his speech at the Munich Security Conference, Secretary of State Marco Rubio voiced some far-right ideas, but his diplomatic tone came as a relief ...

item.title: Brazil, the World’s Largest Catholic Nation, Embraces Polyamory
item.description: More people in a still largely conservative and religious nation are rejecting monogamy as they seek new definitions of romance, and of family.

item.title: Japan Releases Chinese Boat Captain After Detaining Him for 30 Hours
item.description: The captain’s arrest had raised fears of a broader diplomatic confrontation between Japan and China, which have been at odds for months.
